Functions and definitions for Unicode codepoint classification and font management in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[codepoint.c](codepoint.c.md)**: Defines functions to classify Unicode codepoints into categories like emoji, ideograph, and formatting.
- **[codepoint.h](codepoint.h.md)**: Defines codepoint constants and functions to check codepoint properties for text rendering.
- **[fonts.c](fonts.c.md)**: Functions for managing system and custom fonts, including loading, unloading, and retrieving font properties.
- **[fonts.h](fonts.h.md)**: Functions and types for loading, managing, and unloading system and custom fonts in Pebble firmware.
- **[fonts_private.h](fonts_private.h.md)**: Definitions and structures for font metadata and features in different versions for text rendering.
